title: ClickUp · Pricing
raw_text: ClickUp provides Free Forever, Unlimited at $7 per user/month, Business at $12 per user/month, and Enterprise plans. ClickUp Automations include 100+ pre-built automations and the ability to build custom workflow triggers across tasks, docs, and integrations.
summary: ClickUp provides Free Forever, Unlimited at $7 per user/month, Business at $12 per user/month, and Enterprise plans. Cli
